inputs.label: Average Cycle Length
inputs.businessContext: The average number of days between the first day of one period and the first day of the next.

businessContext_i18n.en: The average number of days between the first day of one period and the first day of the next.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir adetin ilk günü ile bir sonraki adetin ilk günü arasındaki ortalama gün sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die durchschnittliche Anzahl der Tage zwischen dem ersten Tag eines Zeitraums und dem ersten Tag des nächsten.

inputs.label: Luteal Phase Length
inputs.businessContext: The number of days between ovulation and the start of the next period, typically constant for an individual.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of days between ovulation and the start of the next period, typically constant for an individual.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ovulasyon ile bir sonraki adetin başlangıcı arasındaki gün sayısı, genellikle birey için sabittir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl der Tage zwischen dem Eisprung und dem Beginn der nächsten Periode, die für eine Person typischerweise konstant ist.

inputs.label: Sperm Lifespan
inputs.businessContext: Maximum number of days sperm can survive in the female reproductive tract.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum number of days sperm can survive in the female reproductive tract.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Spermin kadın üreme sisteminde hayatta kalabileceği maksimum gün sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale Anzahl von Tagen, die Spermien im weiblichen Fortpflanzungstrakt überleben können.

inputs.label: Egg Lifespan
inputs.businessContext: Number of days the egg is viable after ovulation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days the egg is viable after ovulation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ovulasyondan sonra yumurtanın canlı kaldığı gün sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Tage, an denen die Eizelle nach dem Eisprung lebensfähig ist.

breakdown: Fertile window start: ${fertileStart} (based on sperm lifespan of ${spermLifeSpan} days)
Fertile window end: ${fertileEnd} (based on egg lifespan of ${eggLifeSpan} day(s))
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
